use_cases: Hero section backgrounds with dynamic swirling effects
Landing page visual ambiance and decoration
Web app decorative animations and transitions
Branded visual effects for marketing pages
ai_summary: A WebGL shader-based swirling visual effect component using GLSL with simplex noise for procedural animation. Renders dynamic, colorful swirl patterns that can be customized with front/back colors, shape type, and pixel size parameters. The animation is time-driven and creates organic flowing visuals suitable for hero sections, backgrounds, and decorative elements.
